title: Syrian Chocolate Fritters
description: A unique twist on traditional fritters, combining the rich flavors of Syria with the sweetness of chocolate.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, and salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs and melted butter.
Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture and stir until just combined.
Using a piping bag or a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and cooked through.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Dust the fritters with confectioners' sugar and serve warm.
